results.rendered_html: malli—nātha m. N. of a poet and celebrated commentator (also called Kolācala or Peḍḍa Bhaṭṭa, father of Kumāra-svāmin and Viśveśvara; he lived probably in the 14th or 15th century and wrote commentaries on the Raghuvaṃśa, Kumāra-sambhava, Megha-dūta, Śiśupālavadha, Kirātārjunīya, Bhaṭṭi-kāvya, Naiṣadīya &c.)

results.rendered_html: mallinātha (ma˚ + nātha) m. N. pr. eines Dichters und berühmten Scholiasten, Erklärers des Raghuvaṃsa, Kumārasaṃbhava, Meghadūta, Śiśupālavadha und Kirātārjunīya,  STENZLER, De lexicogr. sanscr. principiis 19 .  Verz. d. Oxf.
